description_long: This object is a cylindrical water cooler with a robust, industrial design, primarily constructed from light blue metal and transparent mesh or plastic panels. The top features a secure, circular lid with two prominent metal latches and a slightly raised central section. Around the body, there are metallic support bands and a vertical ladder-like structure, likely for maintenance or access, as well as a wireframe cup dispenser attached to one side. The base is wide and reinforced, with a circular platform and visible drainage or filtration grates. The overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or public urban environments.
description: A cylindrical, industrial-style water cooler with a blue metal frame, transparent body, and attached cup dispenser and ladder.
description_view_0: This view highlights the wireframe cup dispenser attached to the side and the secure latches on the lid.
description_view_1: This angle shows the transparent body and the absence of the cup dispenser, revealing the internal ladder structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the base with visible drainage grates and the back of the cup dispenser attachment.
description_view_3: This side features the full vertical ladder structure running from the base to the lid, with no cup dispenser visible.
attribute_dispenser_spout_type: No visible spout; cup dispenser is wireframe and attached externally.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel; only mechanical latches and structural features are present.
